title: ActiveCampaign vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: ActiveCampaign vs Flodesk: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
intro: Choosing between ActiveCampaign and Flodesk comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. ActiveCampaign is built for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM, while Flodesk targets visual brands, photographers, and designers. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.

comparison_table.tool_a: Businesses Needing Advanced Automation And Crm

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on visual brands, photographers, and designers

faq.a: It depends on your use case. ActiveCampaign wins for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM, while Flodesk is stronger for visual brands, photographers, and designers. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Flodesk?
faq.a: ActiveCampaign starts at a lower price point ($15/mo vs $38/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Flodesk to ActiveCampaign is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
